Give your specs the cutest home they’ve ever had! 🐰🐻🐥 Our Bunny, Bear & Chicken themed specs holders are the perfect blend of function and adorable design. Whether on your desk, bedside table, or dressing area — these stands keep your glasses safe, scratch-free, and easy to find. Features: Adorable designs: Bunny, Bear & Chicken themes to match your vibe. Scratch-free storage: Keeps your lenses safe and smudge-free. Compact & sturdy: Perfect for any bedside, desk, or shelf. Perfect gift idea: Great for glasses wearers, kids, or anyone who loves cute decor. Why you’ll love it: No more searching for your specs — your glasses will have a dedicated, stylish spot. Plus, they double as aesthetic decor that brightens your room. 📏 Size: Compact, fits any space 🎁 Ideal for: Birthdays, back-to-school gifts, quirky room decor lovers ⚠️ Note: Avoid sticking on walls where paint may peel off. FAQs How do I install it? Peel the adhesive, press on a clean, dry, smooth surface for 30 seconds. Where should I avoid? Freshly painted or peeling walls—use tiles, laminated wood, metal, or smooth paint. Delivery & payment? Ships in 1–2 working days. COD & prepaid available. Privacy policy LayerLabs is committed to protecting your privacy. What We Collect: Your name, email, address, and phone number during checkout Payment details are processed securely via trusted payment gateways Why We Collect: To process and fulfill your orders To communicate order updates or offers To improve our website and services Data Security: We use secure servers and encrypted payment gateways. We do not sell or rent your personal information. No International Data Transfer: Your data is processed and stored only in India. We do not share your data with third parties outside India. For privacy-related concerns, contact us at layerlab3dprinters@gmail.com

Experience calm sophistication with the Emberdome Ivory Ripple Lamp , a minimalist piece that merges modern design with soothing ambiance. The textured ivory dome gently diffuses light to create a serene glow — perfect for winding down in the evening or adding warmth to your workspace. 3D printed with eco-friendly PLA, the Emberdome Ivory brings together sustainability, art, and modern home aesthetics . Its clean ivory shade paired with a terracotta base makes it a timeless fit for contemporary, Japandi, or Scandinavian-inspired interiors. A Big Memory. TinyToons aren’t just figurines — they’re moments, relationships, and emotions made tangible. 👉 Order now & turn your story into a TinyToon Turn real people into timeless mini collectibles 💫 TinyToons are personalised mini figurines crafted to capture your look, vibe, and story — in the cutest possible way. Each TinyToon is custom-designed from your photos , making it a one-of-a-kind keepsake you’ll never find anywhere else. ✨ Why TinyToons? Made just for you – Designed from your real photos Detailed & expressive – Face, hairstyle, outfit & posture recreated Perfect gift – Birthdays, anniversaries, couples & memories Desk-friendly size – Looks great on desks, shelves & side tables Limited, not mass-made – Every piece is individually crafted 🧩 How It Works Place your order Upload clear photos (we’ll guide you after checkout) We will contact you on whatsapp and confirm the design We design your TinyToon Carefully crafted & shipped to you 🎁 Who Is It For? Couples & partners Best friends Family members A meaningful gift for someone special If it’s a memory worth keeping — it’s worth a TinyToon. 📏 Product Details Type: Custom Mini Figurine Material: Premium durable material Finish: Smooth, collectible-style Customisation: Face, hairstyle, outfit & pose Made in India 🇮🇳 🔒 Prepaid only — This is a custom-made product crafted using your uploaded photo. About us LayerLabs: We Make Cool Stuff. One Layer at a Time. At LayerLabs , we believe in creating things that make you stop and say, "Wow, that’s awesome!" We’re a small team with big ideas—designing and building cool, unique, and fun products using cutting-edge 3D printing technology. Every piece we make is a blend of creativity, innovation, and attention to detail —crafted one layer at a time . We don’t do boring. We don’t do ordinary. We make stuff you actually want. Thanks for being a part of our journey. Let’s make cool things together, one layer at a time .

Bring a smile to your coffee breaks 🐢☕ Meet the Chompy Turtle Coaster — a fun, interactive coaster that opens its mouth when you place your cup on it. As soon as you lift the cup, the turtle closes its mouth again, making every sip a little more entertaining. Perfect for work desks, coffee tables, and gifting, this coaster is designed to protect your surface while adding personality to your space . ✨ Why You’ll Love It 🐢 Interactive design – Turtle opens its mouth when a cup is placed ☕ Protects surfaces from heat, stains, and spills 🎁 Perfect gift for coffee lovers, office desks & quirky home décor 🖥️ Great desk accessory – instant conversation starter 🧼 Easy to clean & reusable 📐 Product Details Material: Durable plastic Compatible with: Coffee mugs, tea cups, glasses Use: Home, office, gifting, desk décor ⚠️ Cup shown in images is for demonstration only. Add a personal touch to your home with a custom nameplate made just for you. The Mellow Lamp is designed to create a feeling. Its soft, pleated shade casts a warm, soothing glow that washes away the day's stress, transforming any space into your personal sanctuary. Whether you place it on a nightstand to wind down with a book or on a console to greet you with a gentle light, this lamp brings a peaceful, quiet elegance to your home. Bring home comfort that listens to you. Mellow isn’t just a lamp, it’s your personal mood companion. Designed to transform your room’s vibe instantly, the Mellow Smart Lamp connects effortlessly with your phone or voice assistant, giving you full control over ambience, brightness, and color. Key Features: • Soothing, Diffused Light: The unique pleated design softens the light, eliminating harsh glare and creating a comfortable, relaxed ambiance ideal for unwinding. • Modern, Minimalist Design: With its fluid base and clean lines, this lamp is a work of art that seamlessly blends with contemporary and minimalist decor. • Versatile and Timeless: Its simple yet striking silhouette ensures it looks perfect in any room, from a cozy bedroom to a tranquil living room. • Built to Last: Crafted with durable, high-quality materials, The Mellow Lamp is both beautiful and functional, offering years of peaceful illumination. Specifications: • Dimensions: 9x9x10 inches • Material: PLA • Bulb Type: E27 Wipro bulb included • Power Cord: 2ft Your Mellow Lamp is made from PLA, a heat-sensitive material.
